mainEntity.name: Can Chicago law firms use AEO for featured snippets?
mainEntity.text: Can Chicago law firms use AEO for featured snippets?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Chicago firms optimize for featured snippets via AEO by structuring FAQ content, using LocalBusiness schema, and targeting long-tail queries like 'divorce lawyer Chicago process'.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: AEO positions Chicago practices in paragraph/list snippets. Steps: Audit site for 20 questions, add markup, test voice search. High intent queries drive calls; warn that generic content fails against optimized rivals in competitive markets like Chicago.[1][4]
